sections.faqs__form_subtitle: We'll get back to you within a day.

faqs__items.title: How do I open a trading account?
faqs__items.description: To open a trading account, simply sign up, verify your identity, and choose your preferred account type.

faqs__items.title: What is the minimum deposit required?
faqs__items.description: The minimum deposit varies depending on your account type. Please check our account types section for specific details.

faqs__items.title: Can I try the platform without risk?
faqs__items.description: Yes, we offer demo accounts where you can practice trading with virtual funds before committing real money.

faqs__items.title: Is my money safe with your platform?
faqs__items.description: Absolutely. We use industry-standard security measures and keep client funds in segregated accounts.

faqs__items.title: What trading instruments are available?
faqs__items.description: We offer a wide range of instruments including Forex, CFDs, commodities, indices, and cryptocurrencies.

about.title: About the company

intro_1.highlight: The International financial holding Ester Holdings Inc.
intro_1.text: — is a stable company highly efficient management.

about.intro_2: Company Ester, opened for everything new, is a leader in forming and supporting high standards of work for all financial market.
about.intro_3: Our peculiarity — profitable trading conditions, high quality of servicing and legal security.
about.intro_4: In the first place company puts successful activity of its customers. It is the main criteria of our success.

intro_5.text: — to provide its customers with knowledge and advisory services which guarantee them welfare. We are the universal financial company, which supports high quality of our work on a stable base.

about.business_model_subtitle: Business-model of the company is built on transparent and trusting relationships with a client.
business_model_list: The company receives quotes on ECN-platforms from the leading banks-suppliers of liquidity and from the best prices forms quotes currents for customers.
In the trading terminal a customer can see and trade at the best prices bid and ask by each financial tool.
As a result of customer's order the prices of that supplier of liquidity are executed, who offers at the present moment the best price of purchase or sale.
Our Prime Broker makes clearing (mutual recognition of liabilities) between the Company and banks-suppliers of liquidity.
activity_list: Providing access to the customers to conduct trading operations with foreign currencies and other financial tools through Internet.
Consultations on issues of management of investors assets and investment activity.

career.cta: IF YOU ARE READY TO DYNAMIC GROWTH, YOU ARE AMBITIOUS AND TALENTLY, SEND YOUR SUMMARY.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.subtitle: Variants of partnership

intro_1.highlight: Become a partner of Ester and get income together with brand

intro_2.text: — stable company with highly efficient management. Company Ester Holdings is open to everything new, is a leader in formation and supporting high standards of work for the whole financial market.

partnership.intro_3: We offer the opportunity to build own business under brand of the International company Ester Holdings in the sphere of internet-trading. Hurry up to be the first in your city, open the office of Ester Holdings, and get the most profitable conditions of cooperation, and the main important, high level of income.
offer_list: technical support by opening representative offices;
partnership.agent_description: Get income from trading activity of involved customers! It is easy nowadays, thanks to dynamically growing number of Internet users. The most important priority of the Company Ester Holdings by that is high level of servicing quality and forming of long term relations. That is what will allow you not being a participant of the market Forex, to get constant income as commissions from trading activity of the involved members.
agent_how_list: They are registered and will earn money
You will get commissions from their profit
partnership.franchising_description_1: Partners of the company Ester Holdings receive comprehensive support and individual approach from the side of our experienced specialists. We can select solutions corresponding to your actual necessities and personal goals. Remember, that positive image and impeccable reputation of our Company also work for you.
partnership.franchising_description_2: Franchising with Ester Holdings – is a opportunity to open an office of the company in your city and work under the brand of one of the biggest brokers in the world. You will get developed business technology and comprehensive support of our specialists.
partnership.franchising_business_title: Opening your business with Ester Holdings:
franchising_business_list: Company receives spread by realizing trading operations. You will % of spread of your customers.
Plus you will get all income from providing informational and advisory services, submitted in your office.
franchising_how_list: We select for you the best solution

market_instruments_text: All currency pairs spreads in trading terminal of Ester Holdings company are interbank. Spreads are formed with the help of the trading aggregator, which chooses the best prices, from liquidity providers at each current moment. We provide the very best liquidity at Forex market. Swap means a payment by market participants to roll a position over to the next day.

The process of transfer of open positions to the next day is carried out for all positions that remain open at the 23:59:59 to 00:00:00 time as measured by the Company server. For the transfer of a position to the next day, the Customer account may be credited or debited swaps on such positions.
The sizes of the swaps and the method of their crediting/debiting are stipulated in the respective specifications.
During the bankroller period from 23:55 to 00:05 (time GMT) liquidity is reduced, it is possible to increase the spread and the processing time of the client's orders.

Your access to and use of the website and/or platform constitutes your acceptance of these Trading Conditions and any other legal notices and statements contained on same. Ester may modify these Trading Conditions at any time and without prior notice. Your continued access to and use of the website and/or platform constitutes your acceptance of these Trading Conditions as modified.

trading.mt4_subtitle: Download trading terminal and start earning
trading.mt4_about_text: MetaTrader 4 – the most popular trading platform in the world. Thanks to many years' experience of work with this platform and active participation in its development, we provide you with the most profitable and comfortable conditions.
mt4_features: easy and understandable interface with a variety of tools of technical analysis;
opportunity to trade from smart phones, Ipads and PDAs;
built-in programming language MQL4, allowing to create own trade advisors and indicators;
access to intebank liquidity with the help of the technology МТ4 Bridge, execution without re-quotes (No Dealing Desk);

footer.description: The main goal of Ester is to create the best and most transparent conditions for retail and corporate traders.

legal.regulated: Ester is the official trading name which is regulated by the Seychelles Financial Services Authority (FSA) and holds a Securities Dealer License No. SD018.
legal.risk: Risk Warning: and CFD trading carries a high level of risk and can result in the loss of capital. You should only invest with money you can afford to lose. Trading live instruments cannot be stopped under any circumstances, so it is important that you fully understand the risks involved and seek independent advice if necessary. Please read our risk disclosure and ensure you fully understand it.
legal.restricted: Restricted Countries: Raw Trading Ltd does not provide its services to residents of a number of countries, including the United States, Canada, Israel, New Zealand, Iran and North Korea (Democratic People's Republic of Korea), as well as other jurisdictions where such activities are contrary to local law.
legal.age: To register an account with Ester, you must be at least 18 years old or have reached the age of majority in accordance with the laws of your country. By creating an account, you confirm that you are registering on your own initiative, without any solicitation or offer from Ester.
legal.compliance: Ester does not direct its services or website content to users in countries where their use is prohibited by local laws. If you access this website from a restricted country, you are responsible for compliance with local laws. The Company also does not warrant that the information provided complies with the requirements of all jurisdictions.
